productDisplayName: Vans Men Zapto Del Barco Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by the laid back culture of beach and surf towns, Zapato Del Barco shoes are based on the classic deck shoe design. Team these with cargos shorts and polo neck tees. Upper Suede uppers in deck shoe design for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for reinforcement and added style Cushioned collar and textile lining for extra comfort Wrap-around lace eyelets as design detail Lace-ups over the tongue for added style Wide mouth for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand name tab on the side and on the lasting Cushioned footbed for comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Non-marking outsole for wear on wooden deck surfaces Slightly grooved pattern for slip-resistance Wide lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Use a suede conditioner and brush to keep surface clean Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
